description: Gemini 3 Flash Preview classifies the request and determines whether it should enter the graph pipeline.
The model identifies scientific entities, lexical variants, bilingual search terms, expected answer types, and preferred graph relations.
Neo4j full-text and lexical search, anchor expansion, and merging of graph candidates.
Candidate deduplication, relevance scoring, evidence filtering, and top-context selection.
Gemini 3 Flash Preview synthesizes the final answer from ranked graph evidence.
Complete time from request receipt to the returned backend response.
